title: Floral Sugar Pie
description: A floral, fluffy dessert featuring ground sugar as the main ingredient for an American dish that is also diabetic-friendly.
instructions: In a saucepan, combine the ground sugar and water. Stir gently until all the sugar has dissolved.
Bring the mixture to a simmer over medium heat. Do not allow it to boil; maintain a gentle simmer for about 2 minutes.
Remove from heat and stir in the vanilla extract. Allow the mixture to cool slightly before pouring into a greased pie dish.
Place the pie dish in a larger pan filled with hot water (to create a steamer effect). Ensure that the bottom of the pie dish is completely covered by the water.
Cover the pan with a lid or aluminum foil and place it in your preheated oven. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the filling is golden brown on top and set to the touch.
Remove from heat and let cool before serving.
